summary: The CI job failed because `pnpm` was not installed on the runner. When the `just format` recipe (part of `gen-all`) tried to execute `pnpm format`, the shell reported `pnpm: not found`, causing the recipe to exit with code 127.
root_cause: `pnpm` is not installed on the depot-ubuntu-24.04-arm-16 runner. The `just format` recipe calls `pnpm format`, which fails with exit code 127 (command not found).

evidence.reason: The just recipe attempted to run `pnpm format` as part of the `format` target.
The shell could not find the `pnpm` executable, confirming it is not installed on the runner.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `format` failed on line 221 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: Exit code 127 means command not found; the `format` recipe failed because pnpm is missing.

evidence.quote: error: Recipe `gen-all` failed on line 32 with exit code 127
evidence.reason: The parent `gen-all` recipe also failed as a result, propagating the exit code 127.
GitHub Actions reported the overall job failure with exit code 127.

suggested_fix: Add a step to install pnpm before running `just gen-all` or `just format`, e.g., using `actions/setup-node` with `corepack enable` or the `pnpm/action-setup` GitHub Action.
